messages.content:
Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.

wolfSSL wolfMQTT 1.9 has a heap-based buffer overflow (8 bytes) in MqttDecode_Publish (called from MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket).
A heap-based buffer overflow could lead to arbitrary code execution (ACE) or denial of service (DoS), potentially allowing an attacker to execute harmful code or disrupt service availability.
